spec_match.rationale: Perfect comparative chart highlighting every difference between auto and hint under the revised Chrome 150 guidelines.

interactive.rationale: Presents a neat declarative playground to toggle auto and hint targets natively using popovertarget triggers.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the parent reference card blurb.

edge_cases.rationale: Provides clear code blocks detailing custom migrations if developers rely on auto dismissal triggers.

references.rationale: Properly cites the official ChromeStatus tracking entry under references see also list.

design_system.rationale: Fits beautifully: uses blue highlighting borders, stone rows, and outline buttons.
